title: Craftable Horse Armour & Saddle [CHA&S]
description: Adds crafting recipes for horse armour and saddles.
body:
## Info
This mod makes the horse armour and saddles craftable!

## Supported versions:
| Version | Status             | Launcher              |
| ------- | ------------------ | ----------------- |
| 1.21    | [Up to date]       | Forge, Neoforge & Fabric    |
| 1.20    | [Up to date]       | Forge, Neoforge & Fabric    |
| 1.19    | [Up to date]       | Forge & Fabric    |
| 1.18    | [Up to date]       | Forge & Fabric    |
| 1.17    | [Up to date]       | Forge & Fabric    |
| 1.16    | [Up to date]       | Forge & Fabric    |
| 1.15    | [Up to date]       | Forge & Fabric    |
| 1.14    | [Up to date]       | Forge & Fabric    |
| 1.13    | [Unsupported]      |                   |
| 1.12    | [Up to date]       | Forge             |
| 1.11    | [Up to date]       | Forge             |
| 1.10    | [Up to date]       | Forge             |
| 1.9     | [Up to date]       | Forge             |
| 1.8     | [Up to date]       | Forge             |
| 1.7     | [Up to date]       | Forge             |
